mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an accommodative monetary policy that lowers discount rates, boosting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 60%+ of periods when FEDFUNDS declines by >0.25pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2.5% (CPIAUCSL > 255) triggers central bank rate hikes, increasing equity discount rates and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns exceed 0.5% in 50%+ of periods when CPIAUCSL remains above 255.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and GDP (GDPC1) signals robust supply-side expansion, creating positive momentum in S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO-GDPC1 joint movement drops below 0.05 over 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS > 150k) indicates labor market tightness, driving consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns fall below -0.3% in 40%+ of periods when PAYEMS exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: High housing starts (HOUST > 1200k) combined with strong retail sales (RSAFS > 520k) indicate elevated demand, creating positive S&P 500 momentum over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint HOUST-RSAFS signal fails to produce positive returns in 50%+ of cases during 20d windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate (UNRATE > 3.5%) signals labor market weakness, reducing consumer confidence and causing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns exceed 0.5% in 50%+ of periods when UNRATE rises above 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A dovish monetary policy bias (FEDFUNDS < 2.5% and CPIAUCSL < 2.0%) supports equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined FEDFUNDS-CPIAUCSL signal produces negative returns in 60%+ of cases during 20d windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer demand (RSAFS > 525k) during low housing inventory (HOUST < 1150k) creates inflationary pressure, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: RSAFS-HOUST interaction fails to generate positive returns in 50%+ of triggered periods.
